Name: ='Company Performance Overview | Loan Funnel for Loans Started in $(vYear) as of $(=vCurrentDateAsDate)'

=if($(vYear)=$(vMaxYear),

'Company Performance Detail $(vToDateLabel)',

'Company Performance Detail | Loan Funnel for Loans Started in $(vYear) as of $(=vCurrentDateAsDate)'

)

=if($(vYear)=$(vMaxYear),

'Company Performance Detail $(vToDateLabel)',

'Company Performance Detail | Loan Funnel for Loans Started in $(vYear) as of $(=vCurrentDateAsDate)'

)

='TopTiering by $(=if($(vCompanyScorecardShowHide)=0,'$(vScorecard)','$(vScorecardActor)')) | Production Data  
	$(=Pick(
		Match(vToDate,
			'LastWeekFlag',
			'MTD',
			'PreviousMonthFlag',
			'QTD',
			'PreviousQuarterFlag',
			'YTDFlag',
			'PreviousYearFlag'
			),
			
		'Last Week',
		'Month to Date',
		'Last Month',
		'Quarter to Date',
		'Last Quarter',
		'Year to Date',
		'Last Year'
		)
	)'

=' Company Scorecard | Applications Taken 

$(=Pick(
		Match(vToDate,
			'LastWeekFlag',
			'MTD',
			'PreviousMonthFlag',
			'QTD',
			'PreviousQuarterFlag',
			'YTDFlag',
			'PreviousYearFlag'
			),
			
		'Last Week',
		'Month to Date',
		'Last Month',
		'Quarter to Date',
		'Last Quarter',
		'Year to Date',
		'Last Year'
		
	)
)

from $(=min({$<DateType={Application},[$(vToDate)]={Yes}>}Date)) to $(=max({$<DateType={Application},[$(vToDate)]={Yes}>}Date))'
